calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos. To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT LORENA R. TAX's Claim Of Exemption is granted in part. $100.00 per pay period shall be withheld. The Sheriff shall release the funds currently held to Plaintiff. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
